levels.descEn: Ability to deploy a two-squad motorized infantry by airborne in the designated area
levels.descTemplate: Ability to deploy a two-squad motorized infantry by airborne in the designated area

longDesc: Arbre technologique aérien : chasseurs, bombardiers et appui. « Airborne Squad » monte jusqu'au niveau 1. Effet maximum : « Ability to deploy a two-squad motorized infantry by airborne in the designated area ». Accessible dès le début de la recherche. Indispensable sur Sea Lion, Barbarossa et Midway.
longDescEn: An air-force technology covering fighters, bombers and close support. "Airborne Squad" scales up to level 1. Maximum effect: "Ability to deploy a two-squad motorized infantry by airborne in the designated area". Available from the start of research. Essential on Sea Lion, Barbarossa and Midway.
longDescDe: Eine Luftwaffentechnologie für Jäger, Bomber und Nahunterstützung. „Airborne Squad“ skaliert bis Stufe 1. Maximaler Effekt: „Ability to deploy a two-squad motorized infantry by airborne in the designated area“. Ab Forschungsbeginn verfügbar. Unverzichtbar bei Seelöwe, Barbarossa und Midway.
